notes: S5 extends src/store/multi-client.property.test.ts. Reuses FakeBoard, arbBoardSchedule, buildEventLog from S4. NOTE: S4's design is single-writer (all dispatches from client 0). For D1 multi-client, this constraint must be relaxed to two writers (the whole point of D1 is concurrent equal-timestamp dispatches from two clients to the same task).
